---
title: "Crash Data in California"
author: "Yuan Xie"
format: dashboard
server: shiny
---

```{r}
#| context: setup
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
library(ggiraph)
library(leaflet)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(RColorBrewer)

crashes <- read_csv("crashes_geospatial_2019.csv") |>
  mutate(
    county = str_extract(LOCATION, "(?<=, ).*"),
    crash_date = as.Date(DATETIME),
    month_num = month(DATETIME),
    hour = hour(DATETIME)
  )
```


# {.sidebar}

```{r}
selectInput(
  inputId = 'county', 
  label = 'Choose a County:',
  choices = unique(crashes$county),
  selected = "ALAMEDA")
```

```{r}
selectInput(
  inputId = "vc",
  label = "Violation Category:",
  choices = unique(crashes$PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY),
  selected = "DUI"
)
```

```{r}
checkboxGroupInput(
  inputId = "collision_type",
  label = "Select collision type:",
  choices = unique(crashes$TYPE_OF_COLLISION),
  selected = unique(crashes$TYPE_OF_COLLISION)
)
```


```{r}
radioButtons(
  inputId = "severity",
  label = "Show by Severity?",
  choices = c("yes", "no"),
  selected = "yes"
)
```

```{r}
dateRangeInput(
  inputId = "date_range",
  label = "Select date range:",
  start = "2019-01-01",
  end = "2019-12-31"
)
```

```{r}
selectInput(
  inputId = "tile",
  label = "Choose map style:",
  choices = c(
    "Light" = "CartoDB.Positron",
    "Dark" = "CartoDB.DarkMatter",
    "Street" = "OpenStreetMap",
    "Terrain" = "Stamen.Terrain"
  ),
  selected = "CartoDB.Positron"
)
```

# Map

## Row

```{r}
#| title: "Crash Map"
leafletOutput("map", height = 700)
```

# Trend
## Row

```{r}
#| title: "Monthly Crash Trend in County"
plotlyOutput("monthly_trend", height = 500)
```


```{r}
#| context: server
filtered_crashes <- reactive({
  crashes |>
    filter(
      county == input$county,
      PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY == input$vc,
      TYPE_OF_COLLISION %in% input$collision_type,
      crash_date >= as.Date(input$date_range[1]),
      crash_date <= as.Date(input$date_range[2]),
      !is.na(POINT_X),
      !is.na(POINT_Y)
    )
})

popup_text <- reactive({
  df <- filtered_crashes()

  paste0(
    "<b>County:</b> ", df$county, "<br>",
    "<b>Violation:</b> ", df$PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY, "<br>",
    "<b>Collision:</b> ", df$TYPE_OF_COLLISION, "<br>",
    "<b>Severity:</b> ", df$COLLISION_SEVERITY, "<br>",
    "<b>Killed:</b> ", df$NUMBER_KILLED, "<br>",
    "<b>Injured:</b> ", df$NUMBER_INJURED, "<br>",
    "<b>Date:</b> ", df$crash_date
  )
})

output$map <- renderLeaflet({
  df <- filtered_crashes()

  validate(
    need(nrow(df) > 0, "No crashes match the selected filters.")
  )

  if (input$severity == "yes") {
    pal <- colorFactor(
      palette = "Set1",
      domain = df$COLLISION_SEVERITY
    )

    leaflet(data = df) |>
      addProviderTiles(input$tile) |>
      addCircleMarkers(
        lng = ~POINT_X,
        lat = ~POINT_Y,
        radius = 5,
        color = ~pal(COLLISION_SEVERITY),
        stroke = FALSE,
        fillOpacity = 0.7,
        popup = popup_text()
      ) |>
      addLegend(
        position = "bottomright",
        pal = pal,
        values = ~COLLISION_SEVERITY,
        title = "Collision Severity"
      )
  } else {
    leaflet(data = df) |>
      addProviderTiles(input$tile) |>
      addCircleMarkers(
        lng = ~POINT_X,
        lat = ~POINT_Y,
        radius = 5,
        color = "blue",
        stroke = FALSE,
        fillOpacity = 0.7,
        popup = popup_text()
      )
  }
})

monthly_summary <- reactive({
  filtered_crashes() |>
    count(month_num) |>
    complete(month_num = 1:12, fill = list(n = 0)) |>
    mutate(month_label = month.abb[month_num])
})

output$monthly_trend <- renderPlotly({
  df <- monthly_summary()

  p <- ggplot(
    df,
    aes(
      x = month_num,
      y = n,
      group = 1,
      text = paste0(
        "Month: ", month_label,
        "<br>Crashes: ", n
      )
    )
  ) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_point() +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = 1:12,
      labels = month.abb
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "Month",
      y = "Number of Crashes",
      title = "Crashes by Month"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()

  ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text")
})
```
